warm-ledger-bg.usage: Default page atmosphere for landing, auth, and app shells.

ink-slate.usage: Primary text and high-confidence UI framing.

violet-primary.usage: Primary actions, focus, selected state, and important signal.

muted-slate.usage: Secondary copy, metadata, inactive navigation, and placeholders.

body.purpose: Product copy, form labels, cards, and explanatory prose.

mono.purpose: Generated SQL, schema details, and code-like snippets.

motion.principle: Motion communicates state changes and should respect reduced-motion preferences.

rules: Ledger Violet is scarce and functional.
Resting product surfaces are border-first, not shadow-first.
Avoid dark terminal costume and generic AI SaaS decoration.
